name: SportsGameOdds Event Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for SportsGameOdds event and odds data

structures.name: Event
structures.description: Root object representing a sporting event with associated odds from multiple sportsbooks

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Unique event identifier

fields.name: sport
fields.description: Sport name (football, basketball, baseball, hockey, soccer, mma, golf, tennis)

fields.name: league
fields.description: League abbreviation (NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, EPL, UCL, UFC, PGA, ATP)

fields.name: startTime
fields.description: Event start time in UTC

fields.name: status
fields.description: Event status: scheduled | live | completed | cancelled

fields.name: homeTeam
fields.description: Home team details

fields.name: awayTeam
fields.description: Away team details

fields.name: odds
fields.description: Odds from all sportsbooks for all markets

fields.name: teamId
fields.description: Unique team identifier

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full team name

fields.name: abbreviation
fields.description: Team abbreviation (e.g., NE, LAL, NYY)

fields.name: league
fields.description: League the team competes in

structures.name: OddsLine
structures.description: A single odds line from a specific sportsbook for a given market

fields.name: bookmaker
fields.description: Sportsbook name (DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, etc.)

fields.name: market
fields.description: Market type: moneyline | spread | total | prop

fields.name: period
fields.description: Game period: full_game | first_half | first_quarter | etc.

fields.name: oddId
fields.description: Composite OddID uniquely identifying this odds line

fields.name: homeOdds
fields.description: Home team or over odds in American format

fields.name: awayOdds
fields.description: Away team or under odds in American format

fields.name: line
fields.description: Point spread or total line value

fields.name: lastUpdated
fields.description: Last odds update timestamp

structures.name: UsageStats
structures.description: API usage and rate limit information for an account

fields.name: requestsToday
fields.description: Number of API requests made today

fields.name: requestsMonth
fields.description: Number of API requests made this month

fields.name: dailyLimit
fields.description: Daily request limit for the current plan

fields.name: monthlyLimit
fields.description: Monthly request limit for the current plan

fields.name: planName
fields.description: Name of the current subscription plan
